title: Functions as Values, Signatures, and Composition · Evaluation Trace: Composition Law Tests
summary: Turn repeated validation branches into reusable transformations for an intake service. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp composition law tests increment in a typed composition library with signature evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Test identity and associativity expectations where a composition abstraction claims them.
Create small adapters when neighboring transformation signatures do not align.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
